commit.message:
chore(deps): bump @tootallnate/once and jest-environment-jsdom in /nifi-cuioss-ui (#242) Removes [@tootallnate/once](https://github.com/TooTallNate/once). It's no longer used after updating ancestor dependency [jest-environment-jsdom](https://github.com/jestjs/jest/tree/HEAD/packages/jest-environment-jsdom). These dependencies need to be updated together. Removes `@tootallnate/once` Updates `jest-environment-jsdom` from 29.7.0 to 30.2.0
Release notes

Sourced from jest-environment-jsdom's releases.

30.2.0

Chore & Maintenance

  • [*] Update example repo for testing React Native projects (#15832)
  • [*] Update jest-watch-typeahead to v3 (#15830)

Features

  • [jest-environment-jsdom-abstract] Add support for JSDOM v27 (#15834)

Fixes

  • [jest-config] Fix jest.config.ts with TS loader specified in docblock pragma (#15839)

30.1.3

Fixes

  • Fix unstable_mockModule with node: prefixed core modules.

30.1.2

Fixes

  • [jest-snapshot-utils] Correct snapshot header regexp to work with newline across OSes (#15803)

30.1.1

Fixes

  • [jest-snapshot-utils] Fix deprecated goo.gl snapshot warning not handling Windows end-of-line sequences (#15800)

30.1.0

Features

  • [jest-leak-detector] Configurable GC aggressiveness regarding to V8 heap snapshot generation (#15793)
  • [jest-runtime] Reduce redundant ReferenceError messages
  • [jest-core] Include test modules that failed to load when --onlyFailures is active

Fixes

  • `[jest-snapshot-utils] Fix deprecated goo.gl snapshot guide link not getting replaced with fully canonical URL (#15787)
  • [jest-circus] Fix it.concurrent not working with describe.skip (#15765)
  • [jest-snapshot] Fix mangled inline snapshot updates when used with Prettier 3 and CRLF line endings
  • [jest-runtime] Importing from @jest/globals in more than one file no longer breaks relative paths (#15772)

Chore

  • [expect] Update docblock for toContain() to display info on substring check (#15789)

30.0.2

commit.message:
Fix race condition in parallelize notifications with progress_step > 1

Notifications were sent from worker processes with absolute step positions
on a single channel. With multiprocessing, out-of-order delivery could mark
a job as done prematurely, crashing NotificationCollector with an AssertionError.

Now progress_step > 1 sends notifications from the main process as it consumes
imap results in order, guaranteeing accurate progress tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix infinite cleanup loop, silent bot, and CSP issues

Root Cause Analysis Fixes:
- useVoiceAgent.ts: Add sessionActiveRef, isCleaningUpRef, isMountedRef guards
- useVoiceAgent.ts: Empty dependency array on cleanup useEffect (UNMOUNT only)
- useVoiceAgent.ts: Global utterance storage prevents Chrome GC
- voice.ts: Add isCleaningUp guard to prevent recursive cleanup
- voice.ts: Better playback abort handling during cleanup
- vite.config.ts: Add CSP headers for WebSocket HMR connections
- VoiceInterface.tsx: Always-visible "Tap to Start" label

New files:
- VoiceSupervisor.ts: Google-grade state machine singleton
- useVoiceSupervisor.ts: React hook wrapper
- VoiceTranslatorV2.tsx: Demo component using supervisor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add domain playbooks — structural learning across sessions

The browser now captures domain-specific learnings (URL patterns, UI quirks,
workarounds, anti-patterns) in SQLite and automatically injects them into future
sessions. Every turn the agent completes, an LLM traces error-to-correction
patterns and extracts only the final working approach. The result: a browser
that gets smarter with every session and never repeats the same mistakes.

- New src/domain-playbook.ts: CRUD, exclusion list, LLM update prompt, dual-path update function
- database.ts: domain_playbooks table (domain PK, playbook, version)
- tool-registry.ts: playbook injection on navigate, click (cross-domain), keys (form submit)
- agent.ts: domain tracking, tool attribution, post-execution playbook update
- main.ts: widen cliAuth availability for playbook LLM calls
- README.md: document the Domain Playbooks feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

redirect /show-swipe to showswipe.app (#83)

* fix custom domain routing with postbuild config injection

vercel.json rewrites run after filesystem, so nbanow.app/showswipe.app
always served index.html. postbuild script injects host-based route
rules before the filesystem handler in vercel's build output config,
so custom domains correctly rewrite to their app pages.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase A-5: Avalonia VirtualCanvas control — layout, virtualization, throttling

Implements the Avalonia 11 port of the WPF VirtualCanvas control:

- VirtualCanvas.cs: StyledProperty bindings (Items, Scale, Offset, IsVirtualizing,
  UseRenderTransform, ActualViewbox), ZIndex-sorted visual children management,
  ISpatialIndex-based realize/virtualize pipeline, Measure/Arrange overrides.
- VirtualCanvas.Throttling.cs: Dispatcher.UIThread.Post-based async realization with
  self-adjusting quantum throttling; BeginUpdate/EndUpdate batch API.
- IVisualFactory / DefaultVisualFactory: pluggable factory interface for creating
  Avalonia Controls from ISpatialItems.

Also adds .gitignore and commits the full Phase A skeleton (A-1 through A-4):
solution, VirtualCanvas.Core (VCRect, PriorityQuadTree, ISpatialIndex/ISpatialItem),
and project structure.

fix(line-webhook): multi-tenant destination routing — eliminate default fallback

Remove "default" tenant fallback from LINE webhook to prevent cross-tenant
message mixing. Unknown destinations now return 400 instead of silently
routing to the default tenant.

Changes:
- Workers: remove ALLOW_PUBLIC_LINE_LOOKUP gate from destination lookup endpoint
- Workers: save writes reverse KV (line:tenant2dest:{tenantId}) for cleanup
- Workers: save response includes botUserId + destinationMapped fields
- Workers: delete cleans up both destination-to-tenant and tenant2dest KV keys
- Workers: PUT /admin/settings auto-register also writes tenant2dest reverse key
- Webhook: remove LINE_DEFAULT_TENANT_ID and hardcoded "default" fallback
- Webhook: unknown destination returns 400 {error:"unknown_destination"} (debug=1 too)
- UI: line-setup shows mapping result after save (botUserId / failure warning)
- Fix: destination lookup endpoint used wrong env reference (env → c.env)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: remove .env from git and prevent vite bundling in production

Root cause: esbuild was inlining vite.ts (which has static imports of
the vite package) into the production bundle. Node resolves these
eagerly on load, crashing before any runtime checks can skip them.

Fix: use a variable for the import path so esbuild cannot statically
resolve it. Also remove .env from git tracking to prevent dotenv from
overriding NODE_ENV=production in Docker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ui): skip extraction pipeline when saving document notes via ctrl+s (#614)

## Summary

- When editing notes on a document via the textarea overlay, ctrl+s
triggered the extraction pipeline because the form kind was
`formDocument`. Added a `notesEditMode` guard in
`afterDocumentSaveIfNeeded` to skip extraction for notes-only edits.
- Added regression test `TestDocumentNotesSaveDoesNotTriggerExtraction`.

## Reproduction

1. Open a service log detail, navigate to a document's Notes column
2. Press `e` to open the notes textarea overlay
3. Type some text and press `ctrl+s`
4. Observe extraction pipeline no longer triggers

closes #611

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Render deployment config for static site hosting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

V1 fallback: INSERT rows for all dates covered by rate rules

Previously the fallback had separate UPDATE (for existing rows) and
INSERT (for zero-row rooms) paths. Rooms like Villa Loupa had a few V2
rows with prices, so they hit the UPDATE path which only touched NULL
prices — missing dates were never created. Now uses a single unified
path: INSERT ON CONFLICT for every date in rate rules, preserving
existing V2/PriceLabs prices with COALESCE.

commit.message:
Move lighting from CPU-baked to dynamic GPU shader

Shadows now update as you orbit the camera. Previously, lighting was
baked into vertex colours with a fixed direction and never changed.
Now normals are passed in the vertex buffer and the shader computes
diffuse lighting each frame using the camera direction as the light.
